prerequisites.value: Improved Unarmed Strike, Boar Style, Intimidate 6 ranks.

description.value: **Benefit:** You add piercing damage to the damage types you can deal with your unarmed strikes. Further, you gain a +2 bonus on Intimidate checks to demoralize opponents. While using Boar Style, whenever you tear an opponentâs flesh, you can spend a free action to make an Intimidate check to demoralize that opponent.
